bank.retain_mission: Extract account plans, deal stages, objections, proposals, and outcomes for outbound and account-based motions.
bank.observations_mission: Observations are stable facts about target accounts, ICP, buying-committee patterns, common objections, and pricing/packaging. Ignore stalled-deal noise.

mental_models.name: ICP & Buyer
mental_models.source_query: Who is the ideal customer profile and what does the buying committee look like? Include common objections.

mental_models.name: Winning Motions
mental_models.source_query: Which outbound and account strategies move deals forward? Include win/loss reasons.
